name: vuejs-core
description: Vue 3 (vuejs/core) 모노레포 프리셋 — reactivity/compiler/runtime/vapor 패키지별 도메인. 2026-04-26 1단계 라벨링(100건) 기반.

rule_templates.ci/cd: Verify GitHub Actions workflow locally before merging — {count} regressions
rule_templates.test/e2e: Test environment changes require full suite re-run — {count} flaky regressions
rule_templates.docs: Keep docs and code in sync — {count} mismatches
rule_templates.maintenance: Re-run full test suite after refactor/dependency bumps — {count} regressions
rule_templates.playground: SFC playground changes need manual REPL smoke test — {count} regressions
rule_templates.ssr: Verify server-renderer output against hydration mode — {count} regressions
rule_templates.vapor: Vapor mode is still under development — verify both vapor and vdom interop paths — {count} regressions
rule_templates.compiler: Re-run compiler snapshot tests after AST/transform changes — {count} regressions
rule_templates.reactivity: Reactivity is the hottest path — add focused effect/computed regression tests — {count} regressions
rule_templates.devtools: Devtools changes can affect prod profiling — verify both dev and prod builds — {count} regressions
rule_templates.scheduler: Scheduler changes affect every render — run async/sync flush tests — {count} regressions
rule_templates.hmr: HMR changes require manual dev-server reload check across SFC types — {count} regressions
rule_templates.hydration: Hydration mismatches surface only with __PROD_HYDRATION_MISMATCH_DETAILS__ — verify with that flag — {count} regressions
rule_templates.runtime-dom: DOM patch logic interacts with browser quirks — verify in headless and headed mode — {count} regressions
rule_templates.runtime: runtime-core touches every component lifecycle — re-run full runtime suite — {count} regressions
rule_templates.types: Type-only changes still need dts-test green — {count} dts regressions
rule_templates.config: Restart dev server after config changes — {count} regressions

rule_hints.vapor: → Verify both vapor and vdom interop paths
rule_hints.compiler: → Re-run compiler snapshot tests after AST/transform changes
rule_hints.devtools: → Verify dev and prod builds for profiling changes
rule_hints.scheduler: → Run async/sync flush tests after scheduler changes
rule_hints.hmr: → Manually reload SFC dev-server after HMR changes
rule_hints.runtime-dom: → Headless and headed mode coverage required
